title: 真正令香港學生少了時間鑽研數理科和英文的罪魁禍首係中國語文科

replies.msg:
散播大中華思想，作者都不能滿分的閱讀理解，背誦大量現實冇用的文言文，為考而考嘅聆聽、綜合、說話卷…

學習中文係有價值…但唔需要整到不足五成人合格…考下實際啲嘅實用文寫作咪算…深入的留返中國文學科考啦

係普通話呀

屌你老母
中文真係無用 垃圾黎
可以睇吓外國中小學嘅教育方式

其實中文嘅現代文學幾有價值
係DSE嘅問題姐

quote.msg:
其實中文嘅現代文學幾有價值
係DSE嘅問題姐

replies.msg:
有藝術價值嘅 不過冇實用價值
不如用多啲時間訓練STEM subject好過啦

一直都話狂操英文最有用

數學有心讀工程咪讀

中文夠溝通就得

反正其他科大學都會重教

你中學有心讀大學相關既科自然會讀

冇咪狂操英文

國際學校果d咪一樣冇讀dse d科

一樣英文勁到癲

認同
根本英文、數學必修部分就該考的更深
同埋應該更encourage學生修讀數理化、三大理學、工學也必須要求修讀m1/m2
英文閱讀特別係要考更長篇、更學術嘅閱讀
同埋332233變為323233（數學3，中文2）為入學門檻

quote.msg: 中文真係無用 垃圾黎

replies.msg: 明明無語黎 考乜撚

中文同通識嘅分別在於通識可以唔教 中文唔得 只可以改
改課程同考核方式有困難 所以最簡單嘅解決方法就係最低要求變lv2 同數學通識睇齊
lv2裸考都得 唔會阻到其他科

quote.msg:
其實中文嘅現代文學幾有價值
係DSE嘅問題姐

replies.msg: 根本減一半課時都學到， 反正依家都鼓勵唔到學生欣賞文學，個個都係驚唔合格不斷操卷，又悶又浪費時間
其實AL會考點解唔見有人講

replies.msg:
睇下鄰近地區
變有大學入學考試嘅數學如此淺，如此簡單？
睇下印度、中國、台灣、行過，考緊橢圓雙曲線，定積分不定積分，集合定義，向量，矩陣與行列式，數學歸納法，三角恆等變化，線型規劃，二分法。我講緊呢d係無論文科生、理科生都要修讀嘅必修數學。
從來唔覺得升大學嘅考試，數學必修係要考咁弱智嘅簡單排列組合、指數對數、條件概率、二元一次方程、增長率、圓形幾何、全等。但係算了，我講呢d實有人會話太harsh。殊不知，如此簡單，輕鬆5**嘅必修數學害死一代人，害死香港。
英文同理，參考新加坡A level先得。
呢個基礎上將中文變做選修課都得。

replies.msg:
Ugh. I didn't want to say anything but there are too many holes in your chain of argument so far.

1. A difficult math examination does not a vibrant STEM economy make. As you stated India has a very rigorous math examination. But they have a very low GDP per capita and virtually no local STEM industry to speak of. A good STEM economy actually depends on a region or nation's infrastructure and power to attract international talent.

2. A public examination should be about efficient allocation of resources, not about being a difficult badge of honor. Right now the DSE exam is already difficult enough to sort out the brightest students, seeing as Cambridge University accepts it as an entry qualification. If it was made more difficult it would actually be detrimental to students' holistic development.

3. I assume from your overall tone that you think the very difficult English and Math curricula you proposed is going to encourage intellectual development in students. That is most likely not to happen. Elite students who perhaps would have took interest in studying William Wordsworth or differental equations would become put off these subjects by totally incompetent teachers. And the other students would actively hate learning the elitist curriculum.

In short, maybe you should think more deeply before bashing DSE.
香港應該可以講話全亞洲，高中數理可以唔使強逼學微積分既地地區嚟

The cramming education culture is so deeply embedded in Asian programming. So long as the structure of our society remains unchanged, vehement competition will be inevitable. In the meantime, our northern neighbour is outsmarting our local students and encroaching our STEM research posts in universities. Here you see the contradiction. I agree with your 3 stances considering the holistic interests of students and society.

But stay vigilant. We are a small city with very limited resources. We cannot afford the lack of competitiveness of our next generation.

Ugh. I didn't want to say anything but there are too many holes in your chain of argument so far.

1. A difficult math examination does not a vibrant STEM economy make. As you stated India has a very rigorous math examination. But they have a very low GDP per capita and virtually no local STEM industry to speak of. A good STEM economy actually depends on a region or nation's infrastructure and power to attract international talent.

2. A public examination should be about efficient allocation of resources, not about being a difficult badge of honor. Right now the DSE exam is already difficult enough to sort out the brightest students, seeing as Cambridge University accepts it as an entry qualification. If it was made more difficult it would actually be detrimental to students' holistic development.

3. I assume from your overall tone that you think the very difficult English and Math curricula you proposed is going to encourage intellectual development in students. That is most likely not to happen. Elite students who perhaps would have took interest in studying William Wordsworth or differental equations would become put off these subjects by totally incompetent teachers. And the other students would actively hate learning the elitist curriculum.

In short, maybe you should think more deeply before bashing DSE.

The cramming education culture is so deeply embedded in Asian programming. So long as the structure of our society remains unchanged, vehement competition will be inevitable. In the meantime, our northern neighbour is outsmarting our local students and encroaching our STEM research posts in universities. Here you see the contradiction. I agree with your 3 stances considering the holistic interests of students and society.

But stay vigilant. We are a small city with very limited resources. We cannot afford the lack of competitiveness of our next generation.

replies.msg:
I am glad that you see my point. I think Hongkongers have to stay competitive too but right now a lot of that is being negative affected by political factors outside our control.

For example, the Hong Kong Government built the West Kowloon Cultural District with the supposed intention of cultivating cultural production opportunities for Hongkongers including young people. Recently it is being turned into a center for political propaganda. If things like this continue to happen I can see basically all bright Hongkongers going overseas to develop their careers. That's sad but not something we can change.

睇下印度、中國、台灣、韓國，考緊橢圓雙曲線，定積分不定積分，集合定義，向量，矩陣與行列式，數學歸納法，三角恆等變化，線型規劃，二分法。我講緊呢d係無論文科生、理科生都要修讀嘅必修數學。
從來唔覺得升大學嘅考試，數學必修係要考咁弱智嘅簡單排列組合、指數對數、條件概率、二元一次方程、增長率、圓形幾何、全等、甚至是換主項、精確到幾位有效數字、折扣率。但係算了，我講呢d實有人會話太harsh。殊不知，如此簡單，輕鬆5**嘅必修數學害死一代人，害死香港。
英文同理，參考新加坡A level先得。
呢個基礎上將中文變做選修課都得。

我dse level 5，上到大學學基礎中文課程，先知原來自己作文會寫病句，甚至記者寫文都有病句。

病句之後，再學識成段文既句子邏輯，先知自己文章邏輯1999。

以前ce dse 好講究考生要講正音，冇懶音，但正確的行文句子、行文邏輯係冇提過要點寫。

而家dse 課程令香港考生寫一句通順、冇病句句子都有問題

然後再學埋中文辯論，先知人地同自己的邏輯推論係點玩，讀完起碼成個人講野行文真係有邏輯、有條理左

而家我讀完dse，真正幫到我係實用文寫作，再加說話。但6年課程都唔及我一年大學基礎中文課程咁實用

我dse level 5，上到大學學基礎中文課程，先知原來自己作文會寫病句，甚至記者寫文都有病句。

病句之後，再學識成段文既句子邏輯，先知自己文章邏輯1999。

以前ce dse 好講究考生要講正音，冇懶音，但正確的行文句子、行文邏輯係冇提過要點寫。

然後再學埋中文辯論，先知人地同自己的邏輯推論係點玩，讀完起碼成個人講野行文真係有邏輯、有條理左

而家我讀完dse，真正幫到我係實用文寫作，再加說話。但6年課程都唔及我一年大學基礎中文課程咁實用

我dse level 5，上到大學學基礎中文課程，先知原來自己作文會寫病句，甚至記者寫文都有病句。

病句之後，再學識成段文既句子邏輯，先知自己文章邏輯1999。

以前ce dse 好講究考生要講正音，冇懶音，但正確的行文句子、行文邏輯係冇提過要點寫。

而家dse 課程令香港考生寫一句通順、冇病句句子都有問題

然後再學埋中文辯論，先知人地同自己的邏輯推論係點玩，讀完起碼成個人講野行文真係有邏輯、有條理左

而家我讀完dse，真正幫到我係實用文寫作，再加說話。但6年課程都唔及我一年大學基礎中文課程咁實用

其實文學人寫野好多都好redundant 反而歷史/soc sci人行文通暢簡潔好多

replies.msg:
要quote 就 quote曬全部咪知數學既重要性，去劍橋睇睇：

Classics (three-year course): applicants must take Latin or Greek A-level. If not, the four-year course can be considered.

Computer Science: applicants should ideally offer Maths, Further Maths and Physics. Maths, Further Maths and Computing or Maths, Physics, Computing and AS Further Maths are acceptable alternatives.

Economics: applicants must take Maths A-level.

Engineering: applicants are expected to take Maths, Further Maths and Physics. Those unable to take Further Maths A-level may take Maths, Physics, an AS in Further Maths, and an A-level in any of Chemistry, Biology or Electronics.

English: applicants need to take either English Literature or combined English Language and Literature at A-level.

History: applicants must take History A-level.

History and Modern Languages: applicants must take an A-level in the relevant language, unless they are applying for Russian or Portuguese in which case another foreign language A-level is recommended.

Maths: applicants are normally expected to offer Maths, Further Maths and Physics, although if necessary another facilitating subject may be substituted for Physics.

Medicine: applicants must take Chemistry A-level, and two further A-levels out of Biology, Physics, Maths and Further Maths.

Modern Languages: applicants must take at least one of their selected languages at A-level.

Music: applicants must take Music A-level.

Natural Sciences: all applicants should take Maths A-level. Those intending to take subjects in their first years that are primarily drawn from the Physical Sciences should ideally take Physics and Further Maths A-levels, but may if necessary take Physics and either Biology or Chemistry as well as AS Further Maths. Those intending to study subjects in the first year that are primarily on the Biological Sciences side should ideally take two out of Chemistry, Biology and Physics, although applications from those with only one of these three are not discouraged.

Psychological & Behavioural Sciences: applicants must take Maths and Biology A-levels.

我都覺得，典解中文科唔可以學英文?
張一般實用語言理解同寫作, 同埋文學分開兩科
就似一般English Language 同 English Literature分開，一般英文係無需要學莎士比亞呢D古典文學!
同樣，中文都已分開中國語文+中國文學，前者主打實用性，就算有古文都唔會太多太深。D太深奧欠日常應用的古文，同埋D咩鬼修辭放在中國文學科，作為elective比人考!

不過, 大陸+台灣都好似無分.....

quote.msg:
覺得DSE中文難過英文多多聲
DSE中文唔背書根本冇可能合格到
一半内容都係背書 最撚憎背書
而DSE英文裸考都合格因爲根本唔需要點背書
平時接觸多就已經掂

所以小學打好英文基礎超級重要
建議家長勤操子女D小學英文 至少都撐到去初中

但數學就初中一定要認真讀
miss咗之後高中數學真係好辛苦
會完全聽唔明 日日都分神去畫畫玩手機
最後都係突然醒悟 先靠自己操數學卷

喺度寫埋啲冗句，浪費讀者時間，要人喺度理解你啲歐化中文
到理解完嘞，先得閒入埋嚟討論
知唔知咩叫「有效溝通」？
係呀「冇人理解唔到」，不過睇你啲中文係要比一般人更多嘅時間

同埋乜嘢係「#393： 標題一氣呵成有咩問題？ 使唔使用埋書面語？」
又「和」又「的」又「係」？
你自己都唔知自己噏緊乜嘢

漏咗個「少了」

但係咩事呀？
「少了」、「和」、「的」 跟住搭個 「係」
又以為自己講緊口語，你成句可以辨識做口語嘅字得個「係」字咋
你而家打緊啲「問題書面語」或者「缺憾口語」，仲反問人係咪要書面語

replies.msg: 我打字嗰陣冇諗係書面語定口語，純粹我手寫我心
